description: Perform an ABC inventory analysis on the 250 SKUs in /home/ga/Documents/inventory_abc_analysis.xlsx. The analysis requires calculating 'Annual_Value' (Annual_Demand * Unit_Cost), sorting the data descending by that value, and determining the 'Cumulative_Value' and 'Cumulative_Pct' (formatted as a percentage). Each item must be assigned an 'ABC_Class' ('A' for <= 80%, 'B' for 80-95%, and 'C' for > 95%). The final workbook must include a 'Summary' sheet with a table starting at A1 (headers 'Class' and 'Item_Count') counting the items in each class. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/inventory_abc_analysis.xlsx.
